title: Implement make move for quiet moves and captures
description: Apply standard moves to board state while updating occupancy and clocks.
acceptance: Quiet moves update piece and occupancy state correctly
Captures remove the captured piece correctly
Unit tests cover both move classes

title: Implement make move for castling, en passant, and promotions
description: Apply all special move classes safely and consistently.
acceptance: Castling moves king and rook correctly
En passant removes the correct pawn
Promotion replaces the pawn with the promoted piece

title: Implement unmake move with undo state
description: Restore prior state exactly after every move class.
acceptance: Undo data captures enough information for all move classes
Round-trip tests restore the original board exactly

title: Add make/unmake stress tests and random sequence regression tests
description: Prove that repeated application and reversal of moves does not corrupt state.
acceptance: Random or curated legal move sequences round-trip correctly
Special moves are included in regression coverage

title: Implement UCI handshake and readiness commands
description: Support the basic UCI protocol needed to identify and synchronize the engine.
acceptance: Engine responds to uci with id and uciok
Engine responds to isready with readyok
Engine supports ucinewgame

title: Implement UCI position parsing for startpos and fen
description: Load positions and apply UCI move strings onto the board state.
acceptance: position startpos works
position fen works
Move application from UCI strings is tested

title: Implement baseline evaluation
description: Score positions using material and simple piece-square terms.
acceptance: Material imbalances affect evaluation as expected
Piece-square terms are applied consistently

title: Implement negamax and alpha-beta search
description: Search legal moves to a fixed depth using a baseline depth-first algorithm.
acceptance: Search explores legal moves only
Alpha-beta pruning is integrated
Terminal positions are scored correctly

title: Implement iterative deepening and go depth N
description: Expose depth-limited search through the UCI go command.
acceptance: go depth N returns bestmove
Search deepens incrementally
The engine remains responsive to basic UCI usage

title: Add tactical and mate regression tests for the baseline search
description: Validate that the search can find obvious forcing moves and legal best moves.
acceptance: Mate-in-one tests pass
Simple tactical capture preference tests pass
Bestmove output is legal in all regression positions
